allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const r=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('c:/Users/mifsu/cloveria-n8n/cloveria-fichetech/server/data/recettes.json','utf8'\)\); r.slice\(-3\).forEach\(rec=>{ console.log\('---'\); console.log\('id:', rec.id, 'typeof:', typeof rec.id\); console.log\('nom:', rec.nom\); \(rec.ingredients||[]\).slice\(0,3\).forEach\(i=>console.log\(' ing:', i.nom, 'qte:', i.quantite, 'unite:', i.unite, 'prix:', i.prixUnitaire\)\); }\);")
